title: Records Clerk

rationales.taskAutomation: Filing, classification, and retrieval of digital records is now largely automatable with AI document-management systems; compliance judgment and legal holds still need a person.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI document classification and retrieval tools are credible and maturing quickly inside enterprise content-management platforms.
rationales.adoption: Adoption is common in large organizations with formal records-management functions, spreading to mid-market as document AI gets cheaper.
rationales.agenticExposure: Filing, tagging, and routine retrieval are agent-ownable; retention-schedule judgment and legal-hold compliance stay with a specialist.

tasksGrowing: Records compliance audits and legal holds
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 43-4071 (File Clerks), p25-p75 rounded
insight: AI document-management systems now file, tag, and retrieve most records automatically, pushing this role to High risk. Clerks who move into records compliance and legal-hold work hold a more defensible position than pure filing and retrieval.
